reviews.comment:

Pretty standard gas station. They could use a bit of modernization and expand the parking lot; there's always a line to fill up and lots of motorcycles.

reviews.comment:
Cargue estando de vacaciones.
Estacion ACA en pleno centro de Mercedes. Muy mala atencion en el full.
El playero un divino.
Agua caliente del termo de afuera con ficha de $200, un robo ¡¡¡.
Como soy socio y en muchas estaciones, presentando el carnet te dan la ficha gratis, pregunte y la chica solo me hizo el 10% de descuento ($180), pero lo peor que el termo contaba con 50 segundos para cargar, y salia un hilito de agua, y solo me alcanzo para medio termo..
Caro y encima no lo pude llenar.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up while on vacation.
ACA station right in downtown Mercedes. Very poor service at the full service station.
The attendant was lovely. Hot water from the external thermos costs $200 per token, a rip-off!!!
Since I'm a member and many stations give you the token for free with your membership card, I asked, and the girl only gave me a 10% discount ($180). But the worst part was that the thermos only had a 50-second time limit, and only a trickle of water came out, enough to fill half the thermos.
Expensive, and on top of that, I couldn't even fill it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1NGZfLXlnRRAB

Local de comida es amplio el internet no es bueno tiene dos tv baños olorosos y a mi gusto donde hay moscas no como, más en un local de comidas. Ya no es economico  almorzar.

(Translated by Google)
The restaurant is spacious, but the internet isn't good. It has two TVs, the bathrooms smell, and personally, I don't eat where there are flies, especially in a restaurant. Lunch is no longer cheap.
